title: Architectural and Engineering Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities in such fields as architecture and engineering or research and development in these fields.

tasks.text: Manage the coordination and overall integration of technical activities in architecture or engineering projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct, review, or approve project design changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult or negotiate with clients to prepare project specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Present and explain proposals, reports, or findings to clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with management, production, or marketing staff to discuss project specifications or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess project feasibility by analyzing technology, resource needs, or market demand.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review, recommend, or approve contracts or cost estimates.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement policies, standards, or procedures for engineering and technical work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish scientific or technical goals within broad outlines provided by top management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct recruitment, placement, and evaluation of architecture or engineering project staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform administrative functions, such as reviewing or writing reports, approving expenditures, enforcing rules, or purchasing of materials or services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement programs to improve sustainability or reduce the environmental impacts of engineering or architecture activities or operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate the environmental impacts of engineering, architecture, or research and development activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or direct the installation, testing, operation, maintenance, or repair of facilities or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify environmental threats or opportunities associated with the development and launch of new technologies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, direct, or coordinate survey work with other project activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate environmental regulations or social pressures related to environmental issues to inform strategic or operational decision-making.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Solicit project support by conferring with officials or providing information to the public.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
